decisions.title: Boil the Ocean
decisions.description: Attempt to transform everything at once. Maximum ambition, maximum risk.
decisions.flavor_text: Sage's eye twitches slightly. 'Bold choice. Very... bold.'

decisions.title: Focused MVP Scope
decisions.description: Pick one problem and solve it well before expanding.
decisions.flavor_text: 'One thing done well beats ten things done poorly.' Sage actually smiles.

decisions.title: Start with a Pilot
decisions.description: Run a small experiment before committing to a full approach.
decisions.flavor_text: 'Test and learn. I can work with this.' Sage nods approvingly.

decisions.title: Skip Data Cleanup
decisions.description: Proceed with existing data quality. What could go wrong?
decisions.flavor_text: Delta stares at you for a long moment. 'I'll document that you said that.'

decisions.title: Internal Data Cleanup
decisions.description: Have the existing team clean up the data themselves.
decisions.flavor_text: Delta cracks her knuckles. 'Finally. Someone who listens.'

decisions.title: Hire External Data Consultant
decisions.description: Bring in a specialist to audit and clean the customer database.
decisions.flavor_text: Delta finally smiles. You didn't know she could do that.

decisions.title: Full Data Audit
decisions.description: Comprehensive review of all data systems. Thorough but expensive.
decisions.flavor_text: 'This is how you do it right.' Delta's respect is palpable.

decisions.title: Build Custom Solution
decisions.description: Build the AI solution in-house. Full control, full responsibility.
decisions.flavor_text: Nova's eyes light up. 'Finally, some real engineering.'

decisions.title: Buy Vendor Solution
decisions.description: Purchase an off-the-shelf AI platform. Fast but limiting.
decisions.flavor_text: 'At least it'll work on day one.' The vendor rep smiles too much.

decisions.title: Hybrid Build/Buy
decisions.description: Buy a platform but customize key components in-house.
decisions.flavor_text: 'Best of both worlds. Or worst of both. Time will tell.' - Nova

decisions.title: Mandatory AI Training
decisions.description: Require all affected staff to complete AI training.
decisions.flavor_text: The calendar invites go out. The complaints follow immediately.

decisions.title: Opt-in AI Training
decisions.description: Offer training to interested staff. Less resistance, less coverage.
decisions.flavor_text: 12% opt-in rate. 'That's... about average,' says HR.

decisions.title: Hire ML Engineer
decisions.description: Bring in specialized machine learning talent.
decisions.flavor_text: Nova finally has backup. 'It's like you actually want this to succeed.'

decisions.title: Push Team to Meet Deadline
decisions.description: Ask the team to work extra hours to catch up. Risky.
decisions.flavor_text: The team says yes. Their eyes say something else entirely.

decisions.title: Promise Impossible Timeline
decisions.description: Tell the CEO what they want to hear. Deal with reality later.
decisions.flavor_text: Harry nods, satisfied. For now.

decisions.title: Give Honest Timeline
decisions.description: Tell the CEO the truth about what's achievable.
decisions.flavor_text: Harry's jaw tightens. 'I appreciate the honesty. I think.'

decisions.title: Early Executive Demo
decisions.description: Show progress to leadership before you're fully ready.
decisions.flavor_text: The demo gods are fickle. Today they smile upon you.

decisions.title: Skip Stakeholder Alignment
decisions.description: Move fast. Get buy-in later. What could possibly go wrong?
decisions.flavor_text: 'We'll loop them in later.' Famous last words.

decisions.title: Stakeholder Roadshow
decisions.description: Tour the organization explaining the AI initiative.
decisions.flavor_text: By meeting 12, your talking points are flawless. By meeting 20, so is your smile.

decisions.title: Pursue Quick Win
decisions.description: Focus on something small but visible to build momentum.
decisions.flavor_text: Nova ships a demo in 48 hours. It's beautiful. It's also very temporary.

decisions.title: Platform Reliability Investment
decisions.description: Invest in monitoring, rollback capability, and infrastructure hardening.
decisions.flavor_text: Rex looks like he might cry. 'You have no idea how long I've waited for someone to approve this.'

decisions.title: Server Room Upgrade
decisions.description: Unlock and upgrade the basement server room for AI workloads.
decisions.flavor_text: The server room hums to life for the first time in years. Rex pats a rack affectionately.

decisions.title: Skip Infrastructure Investment
decisions.description: Use existing infrastructure as-is. Save money now, pay later.
decisions.flavor_text: Rex sighs. 'I'll start updating my resume.'

decisions.title: Change Champions Network
decisions.description: Recruit enthusiastic early adopters as peer advocates across departments.
decisions.flavor_text: Morgan recruits 8 champions in a week. 'I've been waiting years to try this approach.'

decisions.title: Push Through Resistance
decisions.description: Ignore pushback and mandate adoption. Efficiency over feelings.
decisions.flavor_text: Morgan's face goes white. 'You have no idea what you've just done.'

decisions.title: Manager Briefing Program
decisions.description: Brief all managers before any team-wide announcements.
decisions.flavor_text: For the first time, managers feel prepared instead of ambushed. Morgan beams.

decisions.title: AI Literacy Program
decisions.description: Short, hands-on modules teaching AI fundamentals with real company data.
decisions.flavor_text: Casey's modules get a 4.2/5 satisfaction rating. 'That's unheard of for internal training!'

decisions.title: Peer Mentoring Network
decisions.description: Pair early adopters with skeptics for hands-on peer learning.
decisions.flavor_text: 'Nothing works better than seeing your colleague succeed.' Casey was right.

decisions.title: Hire Platform Engineer
decisions.description: Give Rex backup — hire someone who can share the on-call burden.
decisions.flavor_text: Rex: 'Another human who understands YAML? I didn't think they existed.'

decisions.title: AI Initiative Announcement (Prepared)
decisions.description: Company-wide AI initiative announcement. Morgan reviewed the messaging.
decisions.flavor_text: The announcement goes out. This time, managers were ready. Nobody panicked.

decisions.title: AI Initiative Announcement (Unprepared)
decisions.description: Company-wide AI initiative announcement. No comms plan in place.
decisions.flavor_text: The announcement goes out. Slack explodes. Three people update their LinkedIn. Just like Falcon.

decisions.title: Roles Not Being Eliminated (Prepared)
decisions.description: Reassuring message about job safety. Morgan helped frame the language.
decisions.flavor_text: The message lands perfectly. People exhale. The water cooler talk shifts from fear to curiosity.

decisions.title: Roles Not Being Eliminated (Unprepared)
decisions.description: Reassuring message about job safety. Sent without Morgan's input.
decisions.flavor_text: 'Roles not being eliminated' — the subject line alone makes three people nervous. Phrasing matters.

decisions.title: Training Opportunities Available (Prepared)
decisions.description: Announce AI training programs. Casey's programs are ready to go.
decisions.flavor_text: Sign-up rate: 34%. Casey nearly falls out of her chair. 'That's triple the normal rate!'

decisions.title: Training Opportunities Available (Unprepared)
decisions.description: Announce AI training programs. No comms strategy behind it.
decisions.flavor_text: Sign-up rate: 8%. 'That's... about average,' says HR. Casey winces.

decisions.title: Progress Update to Stakeholders (Prepared)
decisions.description: Stakeholder progress report. Data-driven, well-structured.
decisions.flavor_text: The update gets forwarded to the board. Harry sends a rare thumbs-up emoji.

decisions.title: Progress Update to Stakeholders (Unprepared)
decisions.description: Stakeholder progress report. Thrown together without a comms plan.
decisions.flavor_text: The update is fine. Just fine. Nobody is impressed. Nobody is alarmed. Corporate beige.

decisions.title: Call for Early Adopters (Prepared)
decisions.description: Recruit early adopters for the AI pilot. Morgan helped craft the pitch.
decisions.flavor_text: 22 volunteers in 48 hours. Nova is overwhelmed. 'I only have 3 beta slots!'

decisions.title: Call for Early Adopters (Unprepared)
decisions.description: Recruit early adopters for the AI pilot. Sent without comms strategy.
decisions.flavor_text: 4 volunteers. All from IT. The rest of the org didn't understand what they were signing up for.
